app.title: InfraTrack
app.tagline: Open-source fleet intelligence for heavy machinery.

login.brandDescription: Intelligent monitoring and advanced management for construction firms and heavy machinery fleets.
login.entityOwnerDesc: Manage sites, branches and company-wide operations
login.entityAdminDesc: Monitor devices and transports on site
login.ownerHeroTitle: Strategic management for your construction firm
login.ownerHeroDesc: Register your company, pick a plan and get the unique code to link your operations team.
login.opsHeroDesc: Sign in with the company code provided by your construction firm owner.
login.ownerLoginSubtitle: Use your corporate email for your construction or hardware business.
login.opsLoginSubtitle: Use your credentials and the company code provided by your employer.
login.errorAuth: Invalid credentials or the server did not respond. Check your username and password.
login.errorWrongEntity: This account does not match this entity type. Use the correct sign-in (company owner or operations).

signup.ownerHeroDesc: Create your hardware or construction business account and set up fleet monitoring.
signup.opsHeroDesc: Link to the construction firm using the code generated by the account owner.
signup.plansHeroTitle: Choose the plan for your operation
signup.plansHeroDesc: Each plan unlocks capacity for sites, IoT, transports and your field operations team.
signup.ownerSubtitle: Owner details and legal name of the construction entity.
signup.opsSubtitle: Logistics staff linked to an existing company.
signup.companyLegalNameHint: Official name of the construction or hardware business.
signup.companyCodeHint: Code provided by the owner after company registration.
signup.opsCodeNote: No plan selection needed — only your company's code.
signup.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signup.errorAuth: Could not create the account or sign in. Check your details or use another email.
signup.errorInvalidCompanyCode: Code must match INFRA-COMPANY-2026 format (from the owner).
signup.errorProvision: Account was created but staff registration failed. Restart the backend and try again.
signup.plansSubtitle: Choose which modules and capacity your company gets when you enter the dashboard.
signup.planBasicTagline: Pilot: control panel and your first fleet on site.
signup.planBasicFeature1: Control panel with job-site map and alerts
signup.planBasicFeature2: Up to 5 job sites and establishments map
signup.planBasicFeature3: 10 transports with IoT nodes (fuel and engine)
signup.planPremiumFeature1: Everything in Basic, scaled to 40 job sites
signup.planPremiumFeature2: 100 transports and IoT nodes with configurable parameters
signup.planPremiumFeature3: Ops dashboard, drivers and early fuel/temp alerts
signup.planPremiumFeature4: Register devices and units from IoT nodes / Transports
signup.planPremiumFeature5: Site resources: staff, machinery and live telemetry
signup.planEnterpriseTagline: National scale: fleet, integrations and dedicated support.
signup.planEnterpriseFeature1: Unlimited job sites and transport units
signup.planEnterpriseFeature3: IoT nodes, transports and drivers across multiple sites
signup.planEnterpriseFeature5: Custom alert thresholds and IoT parameters per site
signup.successSubtitle: Share this code with your logistics team so they can register.
signup.companyCodeShareHint: Logistics administrators will use it when signing up (Flow B).

list.title: Job sites and branches
list.intro: Active and finished sites. Open detail to view resources.
list.loadError: Could not load job sites from the server. Is the backend running?

establishmentsMap.title: Map of establishments
establishmentsMap.intro: Location and status of each site.

detail.intro: Technical sheet for the job site.
detail.name: Site name
detail.notFound: The requested site was not found.

resources.title: Site resources
resources.intro: Logistics staff and IoT-equipped machinery assigned to this site.
resources.staffHint: Staff already assigned to this site. To assign or change, use Assign logistics staff.
resources.staffEmpty: No administrators assigned. Use Assign logistics staff.
resources.transportEmpty: No units registered on this site.
resources.loadError: Could not load site resources from the server.

form.title: Add job site
form.intro: New work front. Optional coordinates for the establishments map.
form.name: Site name
form.coordsHint: Optional: enter latitude and longitude to place the site on the establishments map.
form.error: Could not save the site on the server.

assignment.title: Assign logistics staff
assignment.intro: Pick staff and a destination site.
assignment.success: Staff assigned to the site successfully.
assignment.errorSelection: Select at least one administrator and an active site.
assignment.error: Could not assign staff on the server.
assignment.inviteIntro: Operations staff register using the company code you received when choosing your plan.
assignment.inviteCodeUniqueHint: Unique to your company. Includes a random suffix so it won't repeat.
assignment.inviteStep1: Share this code with your logistics team.
assignment.inviteStep2: They register using the ops signup link.
assignment.inviteStep3: Return here to assign them to a job site.
assignment.staffEmpty: No staff registered yet. Share the code and registration link with your team.

transport.fuelLow: Low fuel — check for abnormal consumption.

fleetOperations.loadError: Could not load fleet data from the server. Is the backend running?

dashboard.title: Operations dashboard
dashboard.intro: Telemetry and alerts for your assigned job site.
dashboard.alertFuel: Possible fuel theft: >5% drop in 1 min (Truck BCP-204)

list.title: IoT nodes
list.intro: Tank, engine and machinery telemetry sensors on site.

wizard.title: Register device
wizard.intro: Configure the monitoring point and parameters to measure.
wizard.paramsHint: Recommended parameters for the node type are pre-selected; enable others if you want to monitor them.
wizard.success: IoT device registered on the server.
wizard.errorRequired: Enter location, serial number and firmware version.
wizard.errorApi: Could not register the device on the server.
wizard.errorNoMachinery: No machinery without an IoT node. Register a transport first.

detail.sensorsHint: Real-time node readings. Alert thresholds are set when registering the device.

list.title: Transport units
list.intro: Dump trucks, excavators and loaders on site.

wizard.title: Register transport
wizard.intro: Configure the transport unit and parameters to monitor.
wizard.paramsHint: Recommended parameters for the unit type are pre-selected; enable others if you want to monitor them.
wizard.errorApi: Could not register the transport on the server.
wizard.errorNoOperator: No operators in the database. The backend must have at least one.

list.title: Drivers / operators
list.intro: Heavy machinery operators on your assigned site.

common.demoSearch: Search will be wired to the backend in a later iteration.

httpPolicy.demoNote: Active policy: GET only on the wire + POST creates when allowed (`src/app/shared/infratrack-http-policy.ts`). PUT and DELETE are not sent; matching controls are shown disabled.
httpPolicy.putDeleteUiDisabled: Server save disabled: this demo does not use PUT. See `infratrack-http-policy.ts` and set `allowPutDelete: true` when your API supports it.

profile.uiIntro: Your account, details and subscription plan.

subscription.sectionSubtitle: Review or change your company plan, same as during signup.
subscription.noData: We could not find a subscription linked to your user in the API.
subscription.noDataHint: Open “Update plan” to compare tiers; choosing one updates the record when the server allows writes (PUT).

planLimits.worksiteReached: You have reached the job-site limit for your current plan.
planLimits.transportReached: You have reached the transport limit for your current plan.
planLimits.iotReached: You have reached the IoT node limit for your current plan.
planLimits.driversLocked: The drivers module is available from the Premium plan.
planLimits.upgradeHint: Upgrade your plan under Profile → Subscription.
planLimits.advancedReportsLocked: Trend charts and advanced analytics are available from the Premium plan.

subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription plans
subscriptionPlans.intro: Pick Basic, Premium, or Enterprise. Changes are saved in this browser (demo data).
subscriptionPlans.demoHint: Demo data: your selected plan is stored locally and reflected in your profile and control panel.
subscriptionPlans.readOnlyHint: Read-only: changing plan or auto-renew needs server write access (PUT). Ask your project admin to enable it in the HTTP policy if you use API.
subscriptionPlans.noRecord: No subscription record for your user. Create one in API or check the userId filter.
subscriptionPlans.planError: Could not save. Check API and the HTTP policy.

basic.name: Basic
basic.tagline: Control panel, 5 sites and first IoT fleet

premium.name: Premium
premium.tagline: Sites, transports, drivers and field alerts

controlPanel.title: Control Panel
controlPanel.intro: Fleet, fuel, alerts and sites at a glance.

load.empty: No fleet data available to display.

map.title: Fleet mini-map
map.worksitesHint: Active sites in Lima and Ica.
map.empty: No telemetry positions available to plot on the map.
map.hint: Pan and zoom the map. Click a marker for unit details. Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors.
map.dataNote: Marker positions are derived from the fleet registry for this demo (API does not include GPS coordinates).
map.dataNoteTelemetry: Positions use the latest telemetry (latitude / longitude) per unit when available; otherwise a stable fallback around Lima.

markers.warningBody: Warning · Engine temp. elevated · Site D

charts.machineryHint: Breakdown from each unit’s status in the demo fleet.
charts.nodesHint: Online vs offline from each node’s last reported connection state.

alerts.title: Recent alerts
alerts.subtitle: Last 5 alerts (newest first)
alerts.ackError: Could not acknowledge the alert. Please try again.

maintenance.title: Recent maintenance
maintenance.empty: No maintenance records from the API.

telemetry.title: GPS Map
telemetry.intro: Interactive Leaflet map from /machinery and /telemetryData; side panel with IoT status and operator assignment (admin only).

map.intro: Each marker uses the latest telemetry position per IoT node. Click a pin to open the detail panel.
map.pickMachine: Click a colored circle on the map (each one is a machine) to see plate, telemetry and IoT details here.
map.loadError: Could not load machinery, telemetry, or operators. Check your connection.
map.loadPartial: Some API requests failed. The map may be incomplete — check the browser Network tab.
map.assignError: Could not save to the server (non-404 error). Check Network or API.
map.assignLocalOnly: Your API does not expose PUT /machinery/:id (returns 404). The operator change applies only in this session; reload restores server data. Enable per-item routes on el backend or use a full REST backend.
map.noNodes: No linked nodes for this machine.
map.noOperators: No operators returned from the API.

chart.title: Real-time telemetry
chart.hint: Hover points for exact values. Click legend items to show or hide each series.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.intro: Fleet, alerts and efficiency. Filters use demo data.

export.demoPdf: PDF export will connect to the reporting API later.
export.demoExcel: Excel export will connect to the reporting API later.

alertsCenter.title: Alert center
alertsCenter.intro: Demo fleet alerts. Filter by severity, type and acknowledgment.
alertsCenter.loadError: Could not load alerts from the server.
alertsCenter.ownerHint: As an owner you only see alerts with critical severity.
alertsCenter.empty: No alerts match the current filters.

configuration.title: Configuration & Support
configuration.intro: Review fleet status, manage IoT nodes (admins), and check subscriptions from the API.
configuration.loadError: Could not load configuration data from the server.
configuration.fleetCardSubtitle: Figures from your fleet registered on the server
configuration.accountTeaser: Open your profile to see role, contact data, linked operator, and sign out.

iot.cardSubtitle: Administrators only. Device status, register new hardware, and assign each node to a fleet unit.
iot.emptyNodes: No nodes yet. Add one with the button above or seed test data on the server.
iot.nonAdmin: This section is only available to administrators. Sign in with an admin account to manage IoT nodes.
iot.tableFoot: Nodes are kept for history. Saving a new assignment is only available when the environment allows server writes.
iot.linkError: Could not save the assignment. Check connectivity and environment settings.
iot.readOnlyHint: Read-only: reassigning a node to another machine needs write access on the server. It is often off in the demo; your project admin can enable it in the HTTP policy.

addIot.title: Register IoT node
addIot.machineryHint: Links the node to a machine from API.
addIot.lastSeenHint: Example: full ISO timestamp from the device.
addIot.noMachinery: No machinery returned from the API. Create at least one machine under Asset management first.
addIot.error: Could not create the IoT node. Check API and try again.

addMaint.title: Register maintenance
addMaint.nextHint: Used for “next service ≤ 30 days” in the summary.
addMaint.noMachinery: No machinery returned from the API. Create at least one machine under Asset management first.
addMaint.error: Could not create the maintenance record. Check API and try again.

pageNotFound.title: Page not found
pageNotFound.message: The page you requested does not exist in InfraTrack.
